uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds ATH event (0x0D). temperature 22.5 = byte3 22 + (byte4 0x50>>4)/10; humidity 55.5 = byte5 55 + (byte6 0x50>>4)/10. expected.data authored from running reference/upstream-codec.js (ATH.Temperature=22.5, ATH.Humidity=55.5) mapped to vocabulary air.*

uplink.description: ATH negative temperature, -3.5 C / 40 %RH (signed sign-magnitude path)
uplink._note: Synthetic; exercises upstream Convert mode-1 negative path. byte3 131 > 127 => -(131 + 0.5 - 128) = -3.5. Oracle reference/upstream-codec.js yields ATH.Temperature=-3.5, ATH.Humidity=40.

uplink.description: ATH temperature report-on-change increase, 18.7 C / 60.3 %RH, counter 1
uplink._note: Synthetic; eventType 3 -> 'Temperature Report-on-Change Increase'; byte0 0x21 -> counter nibble 1. Oracle yields ATH.Temperature=18.7, ATH.Humidity=60.3, Counter=1.

uplink.description: Supervisory event, battery 3.6 V (battery as vocabulary volts)
uplink._note: Synthetic supervisory event (0x01). battery 3.6 = byte4 0x36 nibbles (3 + 6/10); accumulation 5 = byte9*256+byte10. Oracle yields Supervisory.Battery='3.6V', Accumulation=5, all flags 0.

uplink.description: Supervisory event, battery low flag set, 3.2 V, accumulation 256
uplink._note: Synthetic; byte2 0x02 sets BatteryLow bit. battery 3.2 = byte4 0x32 nibbles; accumulation 256 = byte9 1*256+byte10 0. Oracle yields Supervisory.Battery='3.2V', BatteryLow=1, Accumulation=256.

uplink.description: Unsupported event type returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic; payload type 0x99 is not an event this device emits. Upstream returns {data:{Event:'UNDEFINED'}}; our output contract forbids a no-data measurement, so we authored an error instead.
